title: Added Local Analytics Tag Read APIs
summary: Extended the local Studio analytics API adapter to serve tag registry, aliases, assignments, and groups read payloads through the app server.
effect: Local Studio views that use the shared Studio data loader can now read tag registry, aliases, assignments, and groups through /studio/api/analytics/... when the local runtime config is present. Static JSON paths remain the fallback for unmigrated Jekyll contexts, and analytics write mutations are not moved in this slice.
verification: Python compile checks passed for scripts/studio/studio_analytics_api.py, scripts/studio/studio_app_config.py, and tests/python/test_studio_app_server.py
